title: The Spirit of Good
writer: Clifford Howard, Burke Jenkins, Denison Clift
actors: Madlaine Traverse, Fred R. Stanton, Dick La Reno
plot: Deserted by her husband, showgirl Nell Gordon ventures West to a small desert town where she works in Chuck Lang's dance hall. When Reverend Josiah Calvin comes to town to spread the gospel, Nell and Lang, feeling their livelihood...
